description_long: This is a gold-toned necklace featuring a delicate chain and three large, semi-circular pendant elements arranged vertically. Each pendant is intricately patterned with fine, geometric cutouts, giving the piece a striking and ornate appearance. The pendants are connected in a cascading fashion, creating a tiered effect that draws the eye downward. The chain is fine and appears to be made of small, closely linked segments, complementing the boldness of the pendants. The overall design is symmetrical and balanced, with a strong geometric motif. The necklace is displayed on a matte black bust, highlighting the contrast and detail of the gold elements.
description: A gold-toned necklace with three large, intricately patterned semi-circular pendants suspended on a fine chain. The design is bold, geometric, and highly ornamental.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full necklace with all three semi-circular pendants and the fine chain clearly visible.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the necklace's profile and the way the pendants hang in a cascading manner.
description_view_2: Rear view showing only the chain wrapping around the neck, with no pendants visible.
description_view_3: Left side view similar to the right, displaying the profile of the cascading pendants and the chain.
